name: Christmas Fruit Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Mixed baking spices (allspice, cinnamon, nutmeg)
1/2 cup Mixed dark and light raisins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
3. Rub in the margarine until the mixture resembles fine breadcrumbs.
4. Add fruit, nuts, orange rind, carrots, and spices; mix well.
5. Dissolve sweetener in beaten eggs and combine with dry ingredients.
6. Add enough orange juice to form a soft dough.
7. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch round or 7x7-inch nonstick cake pan.
8. Bake for 45-60 minutes (or use a larger pan and reduce cooking time).
9. The cake should be firm to touch, and a toothpick inserted should come out clean.
10. Allow to cool in the pan.
11. Turn the cake upside down; make a few holes with a toothpick.
12. Drizzle any leftover orange juice and alcohol (if used) over the cake.
13. Store in an airtight container.
14. Icing can be made with apples and cottage cheese.
